content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event Type and Context**: This is a pull request synchronize event on the `ai-gene-review` repository. The PR "Regenerate pages and browser app" is an automated regeneration of static assets after gene review changes, with 1 commit affecting 100 files.

b. **Request Type**: This is a code review request. The user is asking me to review the pull request and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key Information**: 
   - PR adds 535,175 lines and deletes 1,468,240 lines
   - Regenerates 1,322 gene review HTML pages, 89 project pages, and updates browser app
   - Previous Claude comments identified a critical issue: `app/data.js` contains only empty data
   - Multiple accessibility and production code issues have been identified in templates
   - The PR is auto-generated by CI workflow after changes to gene review data

d. **Main Tasks**:
   - Review the critical data.js export failure issue
   - Examine template quality and identify accessibility/production issues
   - Check security and performance implications
   - Assess overall code quality
   - Provide comprehensive feedback on all requested areas

e. **Plan of Action**:
   - Read key files to understand the data export process
   - Examine template files for accessibility and production issues
   - Review sample generated HTML files
   - Check the browser app and data export functionality
   - Provide detailed feedback on all issues found
   - Focus on the critical browser app data export failure

f. **Limitations**: I can perform a thorough code review but cannot run the actual build/test processes or fix the underlying export issue without explicit implementation request.
</analysis>

I'll analyze this pull request and provide comprehensive review feedback. Let me start by examining the key issues that have been identified in previous reviews.

input.body: **Claude is working on PR review...** ### PR Review: Regenerate pages and browser app #### Review Checklist - [ ] Examine the critical app/data.js issue identified in previous reviews - [ ] Review HTML generation quality and templates - [ ] Check for accessibility issues with vote buttons - [ ] Review console.log debug statements in production code - [ ] Check for security issues in generated content - [ ] Assess performance implications - [ ] Look for any validation issues - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback on all requested areas --- [View job](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24684843342)
